odejs;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.3 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_171 in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;%ANDROID_HOME%;%ANDROID_HOME%\cmdline-tools;%ANDROID_HOME%\platform_tools;C:\Users\mail2\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Users\mail2\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\mail2\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: trending
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<https://www.youtube.com/> but was:<https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/challenge/pwd?TL=AKOx4s2bTjVsomFPtEmEGHVmr0rcGWv9ehDRZgCuoeP3CaGECc7Zz0bHgcjXoZjD&checkConnection=youtube%3A419&checkedDomains=youtube&cid=1&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252F&ddm=1&dsh=S1174668207%3A1732424293578428&ec=65620&flowEntry=ServiceLogin&flowName=GlifWebSignIn&hl=en&ifkv=AcMMx-dHS8UpIvAzXV4KI4zkvh0r5YsmpbU8RM5HmfmsIl9Ux_GQvKwgPBQ_r86xe8W0QgFZYxkwcA&pstMsg=1&service=youtube> at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:489) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:118) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:171) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:181) at org.testing.testScripts.TC1.trending(TC1.java:34)
